content:
💡 ExploitDB-Hunter | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To efficiently search for and download security exploits from Exploit-DB via a command-line interface, streamlining the workflow for information security professionals.
✨ Key Features: • Search exploits by CVE ID or title • Download exploits directly from the command line • Interactive terminal interface for selecting exploits • Filter exploits by type, platform, port, and tags • Customizable download directory
📖 Summary: ExploitDB-Hunter is a lightweight Python command-line tool designed to simplify the process of searching and downloading exploits from the Exploit-DB database. It offers an interactive terminal interface, eliminating the need to manually browse the website.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
